dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes trend-following during infrequent trending periods (15-25% of time). Entry uses ADX_14 > 25 as trend confirmation combined with price/SMA relationship. Exit on trend reversal via moving average crossover. The 20% drawdown limit is enforced as stop_loss_pct. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to handle both long and short trend entries. Momentum indicator requirement satisfied by ADX directional strength metric.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes trend-following during infrequent trending periods (15-25% of time). Entry uses ADX_14 > 25 as trend confirmation combined with price/SMA relationship. Exit on trend reversal via moving average crossover. The 20% drawdown limit is enforced as stop_loss_pct. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to handle both long and short trend entries. Momentum indicator requirement satisfied by ADX directional strength metric.

source_rule_text: A trend follower must accept trading through unfavorable market periods to avoid missing major trends, because trends occur infrequently (15-25% of the time) and the cost of sitting out is missing the profitable moves.
